nasb.text: Thus says the Lord, “For three transgressions of Israel and for four I will not revoke its punishment, Because they sell the righteous for money And the needy for a pair of sandals.

esv.text: Thus says the Lord: “For three transgressions of Israel, and for four, I will not revoke the punishment, because they sell the righteous for silver, and the needy for a pair of sandals—

cnv.text: “耶和華這樣說： ‘以色列三番四次犯罪， 我必不收回懲罰他的命令； 因為他為了銀子賣義人， 為了一雙鞋賣窮人。

ccb.text: 耶和华说： “以色列人三番四次地犯罪， 我必不收回对他们的惩罚， 因为他们为了银子卖掉义人， 为了一双鞋子卖掉穷人。
